block_00: Potential Custodial/Maintenance Fee on open Cryptocurrency Positions
block_04: (“T&C”) have been amended with the addition of Section 4(i) which shall take effect as of 01 April 2019 (“Change”).
block_05: By this letter you are hereby formally notified about the Change and in particular that:
block_06: Cryptocurrency Positions (without leverage) that have been open for 3 months or more as of 01 April 2019 (“Open Position”) may be subject to a maintenance/custodial fee as of 01 April, 2019, upon the discretion of IQOption.
block_07: The maintenance/custodial fee, shall be calculated, applied and deducted from the balance of the Open Crypto Currency Position in the manner as described in Section 4(i) of the T&C.
block_08: If you currently hold one or more Open Positions, and you wish to avoid the application of any maintenance/custodial fee, we advise you to close any or all of your open positions until 31 March 2019. If on 01 April 2019 any of your Open Positions remain open, then the maintenance/custodial fee shall be calculated and deducted from your Open Position.
block_10: Should you have any questions, our Support team will be happy to help.
